hero.subtitle: Upload attendance CSV/Excel, validate Belgian IDs (NISS/BIS/Limosa), and generate compliant XML for Checkinatwork & CIAO. Zero hardware required.

features.title: Why Checkin OK?
features.validationDesc: Modulo-97 checksum verification for NISS/BIS numbers with pre/post-2000 birth year detection and BIS month normalization
features.aiDesc: Azure GPT-4o fixes typographical errors, extracts timestamps from natural language, and separates concatenated fields
features.xmlDesc: XSD v1.13 compliant payloads for both Checkinatwork (daily presence) and CIAO (real-time timestamps with rest breaks)
features.privacyDesc: All PII processed in volatile RAM only. No database storage of names, NISS, BIS, or Limosa IDs. GBA/GDPR compliant.

pricing.title: Simple, flat pricing
pricing.businessDesc: Everything you need for Belgian attendance compliance

footer.description: Checkin OK automates Belgian NSSO attendance declarations for Checkinatwork and CIAO compliance.

cookie.message: We use technical cookies to improve your experience. No personal data is shared with third parties.

legal.privacyIntroText: Checkin OK, operated by Radom UG (haftungsbeschränkt), is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle data when you use our service.
legal.privacyDataText: We process attendance files (CSV/Excel) containing worker IDs (NISS/BIS/Limosa) that you upload. Files are processed in volatile memory only and never written to disk or stored in any database. All PII is purged immediately after NSSO transmission.
legal.privacyRetentionText: Zero data retention for PII. We only store aggregate usage statistics (success/fail counts) for billing purposes. No names, NISS, BIS, or Limosa IDs are ever persisted.
legal.privacyCookiesText: We use only technical cookies essential for the functioning of the application (language preference, session). No tracking or analytics cookies are used.
legal.privacyRightsText: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, and port your personal data. Since we do not retain any PII, these rights are automatically fulfilled.
legal.privacyContactText: For privacy-related inquiries, contact Radom UG (haftungsbeschränkt), Frankfurt am Main, Germany. Email: privacy@checkin-ok.be
legal.termsIntroText: By using Checkin OK, you agree to these terms and conditions. Checkin OK is provided by Radom UG (haftungsbeschränkt), a company registered in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.
legal.termsServiceText: Checkin OK provides automated parsing of attendance data, Belgian government ID validation (NISS/BIS/Limosa), AI-powered data correction, and NSSO-compliant XML generation for Checkinatwork and CIAO declarations. The service is provided as-is without warranty.
legal.termsLiabilityText: Checkin OK and Radom UG shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages including NSSO fines. Users are responsible for verifying the accuracy of declarations before submission to government systems.
legal.termsTerminationText: We may suspend or terminate access to the service at any time for violation of these terms or for any other reason at our sole discretion.
legal.termsGoverningText: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany. The courts of Frankfurt am Main shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
legal.impressumRegisterText: Registered at Amtsgericht Frankfurt am Main, HRB 130877
legal.impressumDisclaimerText: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes. We make no warranties about the completeness, reliability, or accuracy of this information.
